reviews.review_title: YOU NEED TO DOWNLOAD THIS GAME!
reviews.review_description: This is the best game ive ever played it has so much things to do. it has a beach map, forest, shop. and a great moderation experience! this has to be the best vr game of all time!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind words! We’re glad you’re enjoying the game and we’ll keep working to make it even better.

reviews.review_description: I want to be a mod I didn't play it but I know it well be good so here 5 stars

developer_response.body: Thank you for the 5 Star Review! Mod is only available through our Discord when applications are open. Also, Since the game just released, It may not be what you are expecting.
